creator: draco@marino.st
text:
Please apply the attached diff to upgrade lang/gcc-aux from gcc 4.7.1 to gcc 4.7.3.
It has been tested with poudriere on FreeBSD-9.1-amd64
The same patches have been used in pkgsrc for a few weeks without issue.
Also, the options were converted to the new style.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
